presets.name: Top conference default
checks: Verify colorblind accessibility and grayscale readability.
Use redundant marker or line encodings for categorical series.
Export line art as PDF/SVG and raster images at 300+ dpi.

presets.name: Journal-inspired non-official
recommended_for: visual style exploration before final submission
checks: Do not describe these palettes as official publisher branding.
Confirm the journal does not require stricter color conventions.

presets.name: Clinical journal-inspired
checks: Avoid relying on color alone for treatment arms.
Keep non-official journal-inspired disclaimer in documentation.

presets.name: Continuous heatmap
checks: Use a labeled colorbar with units.
Do not use diverging palettes unless the data has a real midpoint.

presets.name: Centered diverging
checks: Set the visual center to the scientifically meaningful midpoint.
Label the midpoint and colorbar range.
Do not use for unordered categories.
